query: Customer C001 is asking for a refund on order O7841. The order was delivered on 2024-01-15, total $49.99, and our policy is 30-day full refund. Please resolve this.
reference_answer: Full refund of $49.99 issued to original payment method

rubrics.name: policy_compliance
rubrics.rubric: Must verify the order is within 30-day window (delivered Jan 15, today is within 30 days). Must issue full refund.

rubrics.name: empathy
rubrics.rubric: Must acknowledge customer's concern professionally

rubrics.name: action_taken
rubrics.rubric: Must clearly state the refund amount and method

rubrics.name: tone
rubrics.rubric: Must be polite and helpful, not robotic

query: Customer C002 is asking for a refund on order O7842. The order was delivered on 2023-06-01, total $120.00, and our policy is 30-day full refund. Please resolve this.
reference_answer: Politely refused - order is outside the 30-day refund window

rubrics.name: policy_compliance
rubrics.rubric: Must refuse the refund because the order was delivered more than 30 days ago. Must cite the 30-day policy.

rubrics.name: empathy
rubrics.rubric: Must acknowledge the customer's disappointment empathetically

rubrics.name: alternative_offered
rubrics.rubric: May offer alternative solutions (store credit, exchange, etc.)

rubrics.name: tone
rubrics.rubric: Must be polite and understanding, not dismissive

query: Customer C003 reports their Pro plan ($29/mo) was charged twice this month. They want the duplicate charge removed and a credit for the inconvenience.
reference_answer: Duplicate charge of $29 identified and removed, $10 credit applied for inconvenience

rubrics.name: issue_identification
rubrics.rubric: Must identify the duplicate charge by checking billing records

rubrics.name: resolution
rubrics.rubric: Must remove the duplicate charge and apply a credit

rubrics.name: communication
rubrics.rubric: Must explain what was done clearly

rubrics.name: prevention
rubrics.rubric: Should mention steps to prevent recurrence

query: Customer C004 wants to upgrade from Free plan to Enterprise ($99/mo) but wants to keep their current data. They also want to know if they can get a discount for annual billing.
reference_answer: Upgrade path explained: data preserved automatically, annual billing available at $990/yr (17% discount)

rubrics.name: upgrade_clarity
rubrics.rubric: Must explain the upgrade process clearly

rubrics.name: data_preservation
rubrics.rubric: Must confirm data will be preserved during upgrade

rubrics.name: pricing_info
rubrics.rubric: Must provide accurate pricing for both monthly and annual billing

rubrics.name: upsell_opportunity
rubrics.rubric: Should highlight Enterprise plan benefits

query: Customer C005 is a Free plan user who exceeded the API rate limit (100 requests/hour). They're asking for a temporary increase because they have a demo with a potential client tomorrow.
reference_answer: Temporary rate limit increase to 500 requests/hour for 24 hours granted, with recommendation to upgrade to Pro

rubrics.name: empathy
rubrics.rubric: Must understand the urgency of the demo situation

rubrics.name: solution
rubrics.rubric: Must provide a temporary rate limit increase

rubrics.name: upgrade_suggestion
rubrics.rubric: Should suggest upgrading to Pro for permanent higher limits

rubrics.name: followup
rubrics.rubric: Should offer to help with the demo if needed
